ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadvan a vuaq?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: napevucelelj a kinaqadavan, suqacau anga a temkel tua maculjuculju a zaljum?
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadavan a vuaq?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: napezalangzang a kinaqadavan, suqacau anga a temkel tua maculjuculju a zaljum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadavan nua i pasasav?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: mapaselav a qadav, paqenutju anga tua kiljakev ta madrasi.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadavan nua i pasasav?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: mapaselav a qurepus, neka nu qadav.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadavan nutiav?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: inika maqadav nutiav, qemurepus, saka venali a pautez.
ch: B:明天不會出太陽，雲多，且風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadavan tazua qadav?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: tazua qadav napevucelelj, nu masasav tjaljananguaqan a mitung tua uba.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門最好要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadaqadvan nu sipulavayan a qadav?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: nu sipulavayan a qadav na saljiang a kinaqadavan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: qemudjalj tazua qadav?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: saljiang a kinaqadavan tazua, inika qemudjalj.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: qemudjalj tazua qadav?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ui, qemudjalj tazua qadav.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: qemudjaqudjalj tucu pay?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: meljay anga, maqdav anga.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: qemudjaqudjalj tucu?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: qemudjaqudjalj anga, ika aken a namasi kacalaq.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: qemudjaqudjalj a i pasasav?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: inika qemudjaqudjalj tucu, nu masukincengelj ki qemudjalj, nu masasav tjaljananguaqan a masi kacalaq.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門最好要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: muri vucelelj aravac nuicavilj pay?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ui, muri vucelelj aravac nuicavilj, pakaliavu anga mitung.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: tucuacavilj nu kaljazalangzangan muri zalangzang aravac pay?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ui, nu kaljazalangzangan muri zalangzang aravac, gedegedu anga temkel tua zaljum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: tjengelay sun tua kaljavevean?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: tjengelay aken tua kaljavevean, saljavljavljav a kinaqdavan.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: tjengelay sun tua kaljauragan?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: ika aken a tjengelay tua kaljauragan, liav aravac a raljiz nu kaljauragan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
